review_notes: The functions provided accurately map to Kubernetes security controls related to access enforcement. The naming conventions are mostly followed, and the functions are descriptive and specific. However, it would be beneficial to include a function related to egress network policies to ensure comprehensive access control.
title: Access Enforcement - Access enforcement | assert and enforce application access (a) require applicati
step1_reasoning: The control AC-3(12) focuses on access enforcement, which in Kubernetes can be mapped to RBAC configurations ensuring least privilege access and preventing administrative privileges. Additionally, enforcing network policies to deny ingress by default aligns with restricting application access. Service account token automount should be disabled to prevent unnecessary access.
